metadata.title: AI Video Generator
metadata.description: Generate videos with AI models, support text-to-video, image-to-video and video-to-video.

page.title: AI Video Generator
page.description: Generate videos with AI models, support text-to-video, image-to-video and video-to-video.

generator.title: Video Generator
generator.description: Generate videos with AI models, support text-to-video, image-to-video and video-to-video.

form.prompt_placeholder: Describe the video content, such as scene, action, style, etc.
form.reference_image_placeholder: Upload a reference image for video generation
form.reference_video_placeholder: Enter the URL of the reference video
form.some_images_failed_to_upload: Image failed to upload, please delete and re-upload
form.prompt_too_long: Prompt is too long, please delete some content

errors.insufficient_credits: Insufficient credits. Please top up to keep creating.
errors.prompt_required: Please enter a prompt before generating.
errors.invalid_model_config: Provider or model is not configured correctly.
errors.reference_image_required: Please upload a reference image before generating.
errors.reference_video_required: Please provide a reference video URL before generating.
errors.create_task_failed: Failed to create a video task

user_facing.insufficient_credits: Insufficient credits. Please top up to keep creating.
user_facing.task_limit: You already have too many active tasks. Please wait for an existing task to finish.
user_facing.model_unavailable: The selected model is currently unavailable. Please switch models or try again later.
user_facing.safety_blocked: This request could not be completed because it may violate safety rules. Please adjust the prompt and try again.
user_facing.service_busy: The generation service is busy right now. Please try again in a moment.
user_facing.timeout: Video generation timed out. Please try again.
user_facing.no_result: The generation completed, but no usable video was returned. Please try again.
user_facing.invalid_input: This request could not be completed. Please adjust the prompt or input and try again.
user_facing.generic: Video generation failed. Please try again.
